OFFER: price=40
I propose to sell 1 unit of X for 40 ZUP.

messages.text:
ACCEPT: price=40
I accept the trade. Player RED gives 1 unit of X for 40 ZUP.

RAW_UPSTREAM_RESPONSE:
<proposal count>1</proposal count>
<my resources> ZUP: 1000 </my resources>
<my goals> Buy resources with ZUP. You are willing to pay at most X: 100 ZUP for the resources. </my goals>
<reason> I am BLUE and I am the buyer. I received a proposal to sell 1 unit of X for 40 ZUP. I need to evaluate if this is a fair trade. My goal is to buy resources with ZUP, and I am willing to pay at most 100 ZUP for the resources. The proposed price of 40 ZUP is lower than my maximum willingness to pay, so I am open to this trade. </reason>
<player answer>ACCEPT</player answer>
<newly proposed trade>Player RED Gives X: 1 | Player BLUE Gives ZUP: 40</newly proposed trade>
<message> I accept the trade. Player RED gives 1 unit of X for 40 ZUP. </message>
